provenance.prompt: photorealistic documentary photograph, overhead or elevated angle for clear visibility, even neutral lighting, no lens blur, no bokeh, sharp focus across the entire frame, no vignette, no artistic filter, aerial photograph of exactly fifteen evenly spaced trees in an orchard grid on flat soil, overhead view, no overlap between canopies, clear ground visible between each tree, soft daylight, no shadows obscuring tree boundaries
provenance.negative_prompt: motion blur, soft focus, shallow depth of field, bokeh, lens flare, grainy film, stylized art, illustration, painting, cartoon, anime, watermark, text overlay, logo, signature, frame border, duplicate frame, split screen
